infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: handsup needs camera access to record festival clips.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: handsup needs access to your photo library to select videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: handsup saves festival clips to your camera roll.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: handsup needs microphone access to record festival clips with audio.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: handsup uses your location to show nearby festivals.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow handsup to access your photo library to select videos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow handsup to use the camera to record festival clips.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow handsup to use the microphone to record festival clips with audio.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow handsup to save festival clips to your camera roll.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow handsup to save festival clips to your camera roll.
